weeks.focus: Building your first AI backends and integrating Python into the stack.
concepts: Python 3 Crash Course (Syntax, Dictionaries, Virtual Environments)

microProjects.title: 1. Dummy AI Server
microProjects.whatToBuild: A FastAPI backend that accepts a string and returns a simulated "AI sentiment score" (random math).
microProjects.conceptsUsed: pip install fastapi uvicorn, @app.post, Pydantic BaseModel.
microProjects.action: After learning FastAPI -> Build the Dummy AI Server. View Swagger docs.

advancedProject.title: Cross-Language Integration System
advancedProject.features: Frontend HTML form -> Node.js backend -> Internal API call to FastAPI -> Returns sentiment score -> Node.js back to frontend.

openSource.whatToChange: Add missing endpoint variation in beginner Python repository.
openSource.whereToContribute: GitHub issues labeled good first issue AND python.

resources.read: First Steps, Path Parameters, Query Parameters, Request Body. See how Python handles requests.

weeks.focus: Understanding the raw mathematical structures of AI.
concepts: Linear Algebra & Calculus Basics for AI (Matrix multiplication, Derivatives)
PyTorch Basics (Tensors, Operations) - Run strictly on Google Colab.

microProjects.title: 1. Tensor Manipulator
microProjects.whatToBuild: A Google Colab notebook demonstrating tensor creation, reshaping, matrix multiplication, and converting to/from NumPy.
microProjects.action: After learning PyTorch basics -> Build the Tensor Manipulator notebook.

microProjects.title: 2. Tensor Foundations
microProjects.whatToBuild: Write PyTorch script creating two random tensors, multiplying them, and calculating a simple gradient. Push to GitHub.
microProjects.action: Build Tensor Foundations.

advancedProject.title: AI Feedback Logger System
advancedProject.features: Node server queries FastAPI for classification, Node saves both text and classification to MongoDB.

openSource.whatToChange: Add unit tests to untested utility functions in open-source projects.
openSource.contributionFlow: Fork -> Branch -> Write tests -> Commit -> PR.

resources.read: Entire Tensors tutorial.
Tensors, Datasets & DataLoaders, Build the Neural Network.
Watch Neural Networks: Zero to Hero Part 1. Code along in Colab.
resources.skip: Do not just watch it like a movie.

weeks.focus: Building your first training loop in PyTorch.

microProjects.title: 1. The First Brain
microProjects.whatToBuild: Colab notebook building a simple Feed-Forward Neural Network to classify a synthetic dataset.
microProjects.action: Build and train the model. Plot the loss curve.

advancedProject.title: Type-Safe AI Router
advancedProject.features: TS backend receives payload, validates using TS interfaces, saves to PostgreSQL, forwards to FastAPI.

openSource.whatToChange: Add missing TS interfaces to a JS repository.

resources.read: Build the Neural Network, Autograd, Optimization Loop.

weeks.focus: Giving your AI the ability to see and read.
concepts: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for Image Processing
Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) basics for Sequential Data
Saving and Loading PyTorch weights (.pth files)

microProjects.title: 1. MNIST Vision Core
microProjects.whatToBuild: Train a CNN to recognize handwritten digits (MNIST dataset). Save the model weights.
microProjects.action: Build the Vision Core. Download the .pth weights file.

microProjects.title: 2. Vision Checkpoint
microProjects.whatToBuild: Train CIFAR-10 CNN. Save model's state_dict to a .pth file.
microProjects.action: Save and download model.

advancedProject.title: Authenticated AI Image Service
advancedProject.techStack: Turborepo, Node.js (TS), Prisma, JWT, FastAPI, PyTorch.
advancedProject.features: User logs in, sends image. Node validates JWT, sends to FastAPI. FastAPI processes image and returns digit.
advancedProject.conceptsUsed: Auth Middleware, File Handling, Model Inference.

openSource.whatToChange: Implement missing JWT validation check.

resources.read: Training a Classifier (Focus on CNN architecture).
Watch makemore Part 2 (MLP) & Part 3. Code along in Colab.
Read saving and loading mechanics.

weeks.focus: Understanding the core mathematical breakthrough behind modern LLMs.

microProjects.title: 1. Attention Matrix From Scratch
microProjects.whatToBuild: Colab notebook implementing a basic Scaled Dot-Product Attention function using pure PyTorch tensor operations.
microProjects.action: Build the Attention Matrix. Prove softmax output rows sum to 1.

advancedProject.title: React-Node-AI Pipeline
advancedProject.features: React frontend sends text to Node API. Node logs request, forwards to FastAPI. FastAPI returns attention score, React renders bar chart.
advancedProject.conceptsUsed: Full-stack wiring, CORS, React controlled components.

openSource.whatToChange: Fix accessibility issues in a React component library.

resources.read: Mathematical formulas for attention. (Focus on understanding Q, K, V).
Attention in neural networks. Best visual explanation of QKV.

weeks.focus: Leveraging pre-trained state-of-the-art AI models.

microProjects.title: 1. HF Inference Sandbox
microProjects.whatToBuild: Colab notebook downloading BERT model and Tokenizer to perform zero-shot sentiment classification.
microProjects.action: Build the Sandbox. Do not train the model; just run inference.

microProjects.title: 2. The Hugging Face Pipeline
microProjects.whatToBuild: Load distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english model, run sentiment analysis on 5 hardcoded sentences.
microProjects.action: Print the outputs.

advancedProject.title: Production-Grade Sentiment Analyzer
advancedProject.techStack: React, React Router, Node.js (TS), FastAPI, HuggingFace.
advancedProject.features: React UI fetches text. Node validates, FastAPI uses HuggingFace to get sentiment, saves to PostgreSQL, returns to React.
advancedProject.conceptsUsed: Pre-trained AI integration, complex state management.

openSource.whatToChange: Solve infinite re-render due to missing dependency array.

resources.read: Pipeline API, AutoClass tutorial.
Chapter 1 (Transformer Models) and Chapter 2. Do all code exercises in Colab.

weeks.focus: Converting human language into math (Embeddings).

microProjects.title: 1. The Vectorizer
microProjects.whatToBuild: FastAPI endpoint accepting string, returning 384-dimensional vector.
microProjects.action: Calculate mathematical distance between two sentences.

advancedProject.title: Semantic Search Engine V1
advancedProject.features: Next.js queries Bun. Bun forwards to FastAPI to calculate embeddings and return top matches.

openSource.whatToChange: Fix outdated React Router patterns in Next.js boilerplates.

resources.read: Computing Sentence Embeddings, Quickstart, Usage.
Understand how a chunk of text becomes a dense vector representing semantic meaning.

weeks.weekTitle: WEEK 10: Vector Databases & The RAG Pipeline
weeks.focus: Storing millions of text embeddings efficiently.

microProjects.title: 1. Vector Store Populator
microProjects.whatToBuild: Python script splitting text, embedding via SBERT, storing in ChromaDB.
microProjects.action: Build the Populator. Verify storage by querying collection.

microProjects.title: 2. RAG Retrieval API
microProjects.whatToBuild: FastAPI fetching top 3 chunks for a query from ChromaDB.
microProjects.action: Build the API. Test against stored documents.

microProjects.title: 3. The Vector Chunker
microProjects.whatToBuild: Download Wikipedia article. Split into 500-char overlapping segments. Embed using all-MiniLM-L6-v2, push to free Pinecone index.
microProjects.action: Build Vector Chunker.

advancedProject.title: Full-Stack Document Q&A App
advancedProject.techStack: Next.js, Bun, Prisma, FastAPI, ChromaDB, Pinecone.
advancedProject.features: User uploads doc. Bun saves metadata, FastAPI chunks and stores in ChromaDB/Pinecone. User queries text from vector store.

openSource.whatToChange: Add 'How to use with Bun' example to docs. Look at LangChain.js vectorstores directory for Pinecone wrappers.

resources.read: Core API (Client, Collections, Add, Query).
Create free account. Read how to create an Index and upsert vectors.
Document Loaders, Text Splitters, Retrievers.

weeks.focus: Teaching your AI to use tools to solve problems autonomously.

microProjects.title: 1. Calculator Agent
microProjects.whatToBuild: Python script forcing LLM to output TOOL_CALL. Script executes Python eval.
microProjects.action: Build the Calculator Agent from scratch. Do not use LangChain yet.

microProjects.title: 2. The Weather Agent
microProjects.whatToBuild: Python script. Give LLM system prompt explaining get_weather tool. Ask 'weather in Tokyo'. Parse response, run dummy function, return '22°C, Sunny', get final NLP answer.
microProjects.action: Build Weather Agent.

advancedProject.title: Real-Time Agentic Chatbot
advancedProject.features: WebSocket stream between Next.js and Bun. FastAPI generates response and streams tokens back.

openSource.whatToChange: Add connection retry logic to chat app.

resources.read: Abstract and introduction of ReAct paper. Understand paradigm.
Read entirely. Difference between routing, chains, and true autonomous agents.
Understand how LLM outputs structured JSON to execute a specific function.

weeks.focus: Giving your AI the ability to remember past conversations.

microProjects.title: 1. Stateful Chat API
microProjects.whatToBuild: FastAPI endpoint fetching past messages from DB, appending new, sending to LLM.
microProjects.action: Build the Stateful Chat. Test: Tell AI your name, ask it later.

microProjects.title: 2. Sliding Window Summarizer
microProjects.whatToBuild: Python function using small LLM to summarize oldest 5 messages when history hits 10.
microProjects.action: Build Summarizer.

advancedProject.title: Asynchronous RAG Video Processing System
advancedProject.features: Upload large transcript. Bun queues it via BullMQ. FastAPI embeds chunks. Notify UI via WS when done.

openSource.whatToChange: Improve BullMQ documentation. Add example persisting LangChain/LlamaIndex memory to SQL.

weeks.focus: Preventing AI from generating malicious content.

microProjects.whatToBuild: Script using docker pip package. Spins up python:3.9-slim container without network, runs Python string, captures error, destroys container.

microProjects.title: 3. The Self-Correcting Agent (The Glue)
microProjects.whatToBuild: Connect Ephemeral Executor to LangGraph agent as a tool. Give agent logic error prompt. Watch it execute in Docker, read logs, rewrite code.
